title: calea amellus
intro: Calea amellus, also known as Mexican Dream Herb or Dormiloca, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. Its medicinal properties include its ability to act as a sedative and anxiolytic, making it useful in treating insomnia and anxiety disorders. The health benefits of Calea amellus include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of depression and restlessness. Calea amellus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also sometimes smoked or used as a topical application to enhance its therapeutic effects.
